Canonical/normalised 8-column Zera Books 'Xero standard' import schema (transaction_date,description,amount,debit_credit,balance,currency,unique_id,memo) - a reconciled accounting-software import layout, NOT the bank's native online-banking export format. Fully synthetic: 8 rows incl. an opening-balance row (Payroll deposit, Office supplies/Staples inv 88321, Client wire, SaaS subscription, Merchant batch, Rent, Bank service fee); NZD; running balance; debit/credit indicator. Rows are identical across the NZ banks, differing only in the opening balance and the WESTPACNZ- unique_id prefix. CC BY 4.0, attribution Zera Books.
